mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO viewed_profiles (viewer_id, viewed_id) VALUES (#{viewerId}, #{viewedId})
mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.nickname, u.profile_image_url AS profileImageUrl, u.gender, u.birth_year AS birthYear, VEC_DISTANCE( (SELECT taste_vector FROM user_profiles WHERE user_id = #{myUserId}), up.taste_vector ) AS similarityScore FROM users u JOIN group_members gm ON gm.user_id = u.user_id AND gm.group_id = #{groupId} JOIN user_profiles up ON up.user_id = u.user_id WHERE u.user_id != #{myUserId} AND u.status = 'ACTIVE' AND u.user_id NOT IN ( SELECT CASE WHEN f.requester_id = #{myUserId} THEN f.receiver_id ELSE f.requester_id END FROM friendships f WHERE f.status = 'ACCEPTED' AND (f.requester_id = #{myUserId} OR f.receiver_id = #{myUserId}) ) AND u.user_id NOT IN ( SELECT viewed_id FROM viewed_profiles WHERE viewer_id = #{myUserId} ) AND (SELECT taste_vector FROM user_profiles WHERE user_id = #{myUserId}) IS NOT NULL ORDER BY similarityScore ASC
